hotel.name: Urban Stays
hotel.des: {"amenities":"This hostel offers designated smoking areas.","spoken_languages":"Hindi, English","rooms":"Make yourself at home in one of the 90 guestrooms. Complimentary wireless internet access is available to keep you connected. Bathrooms have showers and complimentary toiletries.","onsite_payments":"Debit cards, Cash, American Express","dining":"Mingle with other guests at the complimentary reception, held daily.","business_amenities":"Featured amenities include complimentary newspapers in the lobby, a 24-hour front desk, and laundry facilities.","location":"With a stay at Urban Stays in Mumbai (Masjid Bandar), you'll be within a 5-minute drive of Colaba Causeway and Gateway of India.  This hostel is 10.2 mi (16.4 km) from U.S. Consulate General and 3.3 mi (5.3 km) from Marine Drive.","attractions":"Distances are displayed to the nearest 0.1 mile and kilometer.  Mohammed Ali Road - 0.9 km / 0.6 mi  Crawford Market - 1.2 km / 0.7 mi  St George Hospital - 1.4 km / 0.9 mi  Shri Swaminarayan Temple - 1.5 km / 0.9 mi  St. Xavier's College - 1.7 km / 1.1 mi  Fashion Street Market - 1.9 km / 1.2 mi  Chor Bazaar - 2.1 km / 1.3 mi  Bombay Hospital - 2.3 km / 1.5 mi  Mumbai International Cruise Terminal - 2.4 km / 1.5 mi  Marine Drive - 2.4 km / 1.5 mi  Horniman Circle Gardens - 2.5 km / 1.5 mi  Reserve Bank of India - 2.5 km / 1.6 mi  Bombay Castle - 2.7 km / 1.7 mi  Prince Aly Khan Hospital - 2.8 km / 1.8 mi  Wankhede Stadium - 3 km / 1.9 mi  The nearest major airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport (BOM) - 28.3 km / 17.6 mi","headline":"In Mumbai (Masjid Bandar)"}
